EmailTemplate.name: Annual Meeting Event Notice Six
EmailTemplate.subject: 温馨提示：诚邀您参与答谢晚宴及游园体验活动！You are cordially invited to join the Appreciation Dinner and traditional cultural activities!
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Internal_Registration__c.Name_CN__c}，
答谢晚餐将于18:30开始，欢迎您前往国际中心35楼就餐。 此外，我们还精心准备了游园体验活动，将于19:00在国际中心35+咖啡厅开启，诚邀您前往体验！
Dear {!Internal_Registration__c.Name_CN__c},
The Appreciation Dinner will start at 18:30 in the Buffet Restaurant on the F35 of the International Center. Welcome to attend the dinner.
We have also prepared a traditional cultural tour that will begin at 19:00 in the 35+ Café. We cordially invite you to join us!
